Using social media to follow up. Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, Google Plus. You name them, okay? Some of those names will be around tomorrow and some won't. This is a great place to go and grab data. Search Grant Cardona and any one of those mechanisms, LinkedIn, Facebook, Google, YouTube, any of them. And you're going to find out information on me. That information now can be used to reach out to mention their company. Okay? Understand what I'm doing here. And what I would start doing is start making posts about the company on possibly my Facebook page, my LinkedIn account, my Google Plus. Maybe I would include them in an article about something they're doing, some expansion, something that said something that I'm paying attention to that company and want to flow them power. I could then bring that to their attention, to their business. I could do a video on the company, how great they are, how unbelievable. Understand? What are they paying attention to? The person that I'm talking to, do the decision makers, the social media, do they have a different kind of initiative? I'm collecting data and I'm using it. I'm being creative. It's all there. It's sitting there waiting like a big softball lobbed up waiting for you to crush it out of the park with proper follow up. Use social media. Use them all.
